title: Duel of Champions
writer: Ennio De Concini, Carlo Lizzani, Giuliano Montaldo
actors: Alan Ladd, Franca Bettoia, Franco Fabrizi
plot: In the 5th century BC, rival kingdoms Rome and Alba entrust their fate to a duel to death between their respective chosen champions, the 3 Orazi brothers for Rome and the 3 Curiazi brothers for Alba.
